description.unified: For 5sec, increases own P.Block Chance by [800->400]. On Block, deals 95*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 72.6% ATK P.DMG to nearby enemies and reduces their ATK by [25%->22%].

For 5sec, increases all allies’ P.Block Chance by 400 and prepares to leap. While preparing, becomes immune to CC. On Block, increases the leap attack’s DMG by 8% and deals 52*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 32.7% ATK P.DMG to the attacker. When preparation ends, leaps to the nearest enemy, dealing 515*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 326.2% ATK P.DMG and stuns them for 1sec.
Increases all allies’ P.DEF by [60->84]*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and P.Block Chance by 120.
[Will to Win] increases P.Block chance by 400 and raises the target's P.DMG taken by {0}% for 5 sec.
[Spearhead] recovers 40% of P.DEF every sec when blocking, and increases P.DEF gained by {0}% for 5 sec. P.DEF Boost can stack up to [5->{4}] times.
Increases all allies' P.DEF by {0}%. On Block, has a {1}% chance to recover {2} Mana and reduce the cooldown of all Skills by 1 sec.
